name: Improper Neutralization of Parameter/Argument Delimiters
description: The product does not properly neutralize special characters that function as parameter or argument delimiters (e.g., '&', '=', ';' in query strings) in user input, allowing attackers to inject additional parameters or alter existing ones.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing parameter delimiter characters that flows into TRANSFORM[parameter_construction] or EGRESS[query_string] without a TRANSFORM[delimiter_encode] node that URL-encodes or escapes the delimiter characters
